analysiskmeans 0.0.0.9000
    • Getting Started with analysiskmeans!

    • Package Functions
    • Command Line Interface
    • Acknowledgements

Configure and Normalize input data

Source: R/data_config.r
data_config.Rd

Configure and Normalize input data

Usage

data_config(sce)

Arguments

sce

A SingleCellExperiment object

Value

List of A SingleCellExperiment subset, List of cell type labels and Log Normalized SingleCellExperiment object

Examples

# Assuming 'sce' is a SummarizedExperiment
library(analysiskmeans)
data(example_sce)
sce <- example_sce
analysiskmeans::data_config(sce)
#> Warning: 'librarySizeFactors' is deprecated.
#> Use 'scrapper::centerSizeFactors' instead.
#> See help("Deprecated")
#> Warning: 'normalizeCounts' is deprecated.
#> Use 'scrapper::normalizeCounts' instead.
#> See help("Deprecated")

#> 
#> $cell_type
#> DataFrame with 20 rows and 1 column
#>           label
#>     <character>
#> 1         xylem
#> 2        phloem
#> 3         xylem
#> 4        phloem
#> 5         xylem
#> ...         ...
#> 16       phloem
#> 17        xylem
#> 18       phloem
#> 19        xylem
#> 20       phloem
#> 
#> $sce
#> class: SingleCellExperiment 
#> dim: 100 20 
#> metadata(1): name
#> assays(2): counts logcounts
#> rownames: NULL
#> rowData names(2): name length
#> colnames: NULL
#> colData names(4): cell_type NA NA sizeFactor
#> reducedDimNames(0):
#> mainExpName: NULL
#> altExpNames(0):
#>
